name: mostApRegisterEx
title: mostApRegisterEx
description: mostApRegisterEx() registers the function block with the Application Socket using the functional address (fblockID, instID).
It has to be checked in advance, if the functional address already exists (mostApIsRegisteredEx). If so, another instID has to be selected.
In network status 'ConfigOk' the device's NetBlock reports the new Local FBlockList to the NetworkMaster.

parameters.name: fblockID
parameters.description: Function block identifier to be registered.
